title: senecio fulvus
intro: Senecio fulvus, also known as yellow ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Australia. This plant is known to contain toxic compounds, but it also has some medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio fulvus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Senecio fulvus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
